title: amphymenium orbiculatum
intro: Amphymenium orbiculatum, also known as the club moss or resurrection fern, is a type of lycopodiophyte plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Amphymenium orbiculatum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Amphymenium orbiculatum can be prepared as an herbal remedy through decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
